previous_campaign_summary: Activity heatmap, auto theme, lightbox slideshow, settings profile import/export, bundle optimization, smart prompt autocomplete, smart tag suggestions, bulk conversation operations, virtualized asset grid, auto-save drafts. 18 phases completed, all CI passed.

phases.objective: AI prompt enhancement (rewriting, expansion, tone adjustment)
phases.scope: usePromptEnhance hook with 5 modes: rewrite, expand, formal, casual, shorten. UI buttons appear when draft has content.
phases.user_visible_gain: Users get better AI outputs with improved prompts
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle 658KB (+3KB). Enhance buttons appear in composer actions bar.

phases.scope: useAssetVersions hook tracks tag changes with timestamp and description. Version badge shows count on asset cards.
phases.user_visible_gain: Users can track changes and revert to previous versions
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Records tag add/remove operations. Max 10 versions per asset. Bundle 658KB (no change).

phases.scope: Added drag-to-folder: folder chips accept drops to assign conversations.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Folder chips now accept drag drops. Reordering already existed.

phases.scope: autoCategorize function matches conversation titles against keyword map (图片/视频/代码/文档). Button in sidebar triggers categorization.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Creates folders if they don't exist. Skips already-categorized conversations.

phases.scope: Full checks pass: TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, 49/49 tests pass, build succeeds.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: All checks pass. No issues found.

phases.scope: useAssetQuality analyzes image/video dimensions, file size, format. Shows quality badge (high/medium/low) with suggestions on hover.
phases.user_visible_gain: Users get quality feedback on their assets
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Color-coded badges: green (high), yellow (medium), red (low). Tooltip shows suggestions.

phases.scope: Added batch download button for selected images (2+). Downloads each file individually.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Batch download appears when 2+ images selected.

phases.scope: Added annotation mode with line drawing on images. Canvas overlay with SVG rendering.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Pencil icon toggles annotation mode. Draw lines by click-drag. Purple active state.

phases.scope: useCustomShortcuts hook with 7 customizable actions. Settings modal has shortcut editor with input fields and formatted display.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Shortcuts saved to localStorage. Format shows platform-specific keys (⌘ on Mac, Ctrl on others).

phases.scope: Added 4 export templates (default, minimal, professional, academic) with template selector in ExportModal.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Template selector appears below format options. UI-only for now, ready for template content.

phases.scope: Main bundle 661KB (gzip 200KB). TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, 49/49 tests pass.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Bundle size stable at 661KB. No new heavy dependencies added.

phases.scope: useWorkspaceDefaults hook saves per-workspace settings. ImageWorkspace remembers last size and style.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Workspace defaults saved to localStorage per workspace ID.

phases.scope: useAssetDeduplication detects duplicates by filename and file size. Scan button in toolbar.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Detects duplicates by filename and size. Shows count notification.

phases.scope: Added TrendIndicator component showing week-over-week change percentage. Green/red trend arrows on message stats.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: Compares last 7 days vs previous 7 days. Hides if change < 1%.

phases.scope: ShortcutHint component shows formatted shortcut keys. Can be placed next to any button/label.
phases.local_validation: 49 tests pass, TypeScript clean, ESLint 0 warnings, build succeeds
phases.notes: ShortcutHint component available for use. Shows platform-specific keys.

phases.scope: Extract EXIF, color palette, dominant colors
